steps.title: Look for the amount
steps.content: The goal is to specify how much vitamin C blackberries contain. The relevant note is the measurement: every 100 g of blackberries contains 21 mg of ascorbic acid, which is vitamin C.

steps.title: Keep the quantity
steps.content: A discusses animals, C explains why humans need vitamin C, and D says only that blackberries contain it; none gives the amount. The sentence with 21 mg per 100 g directly fulfills the goal. The answer is B.
